lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਗਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮ ਕਾ ਓਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: man mere gahu har naam kaa olaa |
lines.english: O my mind, hold tight to the Support of the Lord's Name.
Like a boat in the ocean of fear;

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਝੈ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਤਾਤਾ ਝੋਲਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: tujhai na laagai taataa jholaa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The hot winds shall never even touch you. ||1||Pause||
like fire which takes away the pain of cold
like a lamp which illumines the darkness;
- just so, chanting the Name, the mind becomes peaceful. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਤਰਿ ਜਾਇ ਤੇਰੇ ਮਨ ਕੀ ਪਿਆਸ ॥
lines.translit: autar jaae tere man kee piaas |
lines.english: The thirst of your mind shall be quenched,
and all hopes shall be fulfilled.
Your consciousness shall not waver.
He alone receives the panacea, the medicine of the Naam,
Meditate on the Ambrosial Naam as Gurmukh, O my friend. ||3||
unto whom the Lord, in His Grace, bestows it.
- O Nanak, his pains and sorrows are eliminated. ||4||10||79||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਵਸੈ ॥
lines.translit: har har naam jaa kai hiradai vasai |
lines.english: One whose heart is filled with the Name of the Lord, Har, Har
Gauree Gwaarayree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁਤੁ ਦਰਬੁ ਕਰਿ ਮਨੁ ਨ ਅਘਾਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: bahut darab kar man na aghaanaa |
lines.english: Even with vast sums of wealth, the mind is not satisfied.
Gazing upon countless beauties, the man is not satisfied.
Without meditating and vibrating on the Lord, they are crying out in pain.
He is so involved with his wife and sons - he believes that they belong to him.
That wealth shall pass away, and those relatives shall be reduced to ashes. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਬਿਗਾਰੀ ਕੈ ਸਿਰਿ ਦੀਜਹਿ ਦਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: jiau bigaaree kai sir deejeh daam |
lines.english: The servant carries the bags of money on his head,

lines.gurmukhi: ਓਇ ਖਸਮੈ ਕੈ ਗ੍ਰਿਹਿ ਉਨ ਦੂਖ ਸਹਾਮ ॥
lines.translit: oe khasamai kai grihi un dookh sahaam |
lines.english: but it goes to his master's house, and he receives only pain.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਤਨੁ ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਧਨੁ ਮਾਇਆ ਸੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: dhrig tan dhrig dhan maaeaa sang raate |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Their bodies are cursed, and their wealth is cursed - they are imbued with Maya. ||1||Pause||
but when he opens his eyes, he sees that it was all in vain. ||2||
The man sits as a king in his dreams,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਕੈ ਪਾਲੈ ਕਛੂ ਨ ਪੜੈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tis kai paalai kachhoo na parrai |3|
lines.english: but still, nothing comes into his hands. ||3||
The watchman oversees the field of another,

lines.gurmukhi: ਖੇਤੁ ਖਸਮ ਕਾ ਰਾਖਾ ਉਠਿ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: khet khasam kaa raakhaa utth jaae |
lines.english: but the field belongs to his master, while he must get up and depart.
He works so hard, and suffers for that field,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕਾ ਰਾਜੁ ਤਿਸੈ ਕਾ ਸੁਪਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: jis kaa raaj tisai kaa supanaa |
lines.english: The dream is His, and the kingdom is His;

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਮਾਇਆ ਦੀਨੀ ਤਿਨਿ ਲਾਈ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ॥
lines.translit: jin maaeaa deenee tin laaee trisanaa |
lines.english: He who has given the wealth of Maya, has infused the desire for it.
He Himself annihilates, and He Himself restores.
Nanak offers this prayer to God. ||4||11||80||
Gauree Gwaarayree, Fifth Mehl:
With pen and paper, I have written clever things.
I have seen what it is to be a chief, a king, and an emperor,

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਹੁ ਰੰਗ ਮਾਇਆ ਬਹੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਪੇਖੀ ॥
lines.translit: bahu rang maaeaa bahu bidh pekhee |
lines.english: I have gazed upon the many forms of Maya, in so many ways.
which will quench my thirst and satisfy my mind. ||1||Pause||
but they do not satisfy the mind. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਸੁਖੁ ਮੋ ਕਉ ਸੰਤ ਬਤਾਵਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: so sukh mo kau sant bataavahu |
lines.english: Show me that peace, O Saints,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਮਹਿ ਮਨਿ ਸੰਤੋਖੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: taa meh man santokh na paaeaa |2|
lines.english: - but even with them, the mind does not find contentment. ||2||
actors in dramas, singing in theaters
You may have horses as fast as the wind, elephants to ride on,
sandalwood oil, and beautiful women in bed,
You may have a throne at the royal court, with beautiful decorations and soft carpets,
all sorts of luscious fruits and beautiful gardens,
the excitement of the chase and princely pleasures
- but still, the mind is not made happy by such illusory diversions. ||3||
and so I have obtained all comforts and joy.
In their kindness, the Saints have told me of the True One,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਹਰਿ ਧਨੁ ਸੋਈ ਸੁਹੇਲਾ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai har dhan soee suhelaa |
lines.english: One who obtains the wealth of the Lord becomes happy.
Says Nanak, through great good fortune, I have found this. ||4||
In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, I sing the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਸਾਧਸੰਗਿ ਮੇਲਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ਦੂਜਾ ॥੧੨॥੮੧॥
lines.translit: prabh kirapaa te saadhasang melaa |1| rahaau doojaa |12|81|
lines.english: By God's Grace, I have joined the Saadh Sangat. ||1||Second Pause||12||81||
Gauree Gwaarayree, Fifth Mehl:
